channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of IoT Security: Addressing the Gaps and Risks
item.description: The Future of IoT Security: Addressing the Gaps and Risks
item.dc:creator: Svetlin Todorov, Fast Company

item.title: SEC and Binance request 60-day pause in lawsuit as the agency shifts to be more crypto-friendly
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is seeking to pause its high-profile lawsuit against the cryptocurrency exchange Binance as the regulator tries to present itself as more crypto-friendly under a new administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: SoftBank reveals $2.4 billion loss in Q3
item.description: Japanese technology company SoftBank Group Corp. reported a 369.2 billion yen ($2.4 billion) loss for the fiscal third quarter as it racked up red ink from its Vision Fund investments. That’s compared to a 950 billion yen profit in October-December 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: House Commerce chair launches data privacy working group
item.description: House Committee on Energy and Commerce Chair Brett Guthrie (R-Ky.) on Wednesday announced the creation of a data privacy working group as policymakers work toward a national privacy standard.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Adds Eight New Servers to Its ProLiant Portfolio
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has added eight new servers to its ProLiant Gen 12 server portfolio, bringing advanced security and AI-optimization features to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Matching tech to degrees of scale at the Salvation Army
item.description: The Salvation Army is a household name but beyond the iconic red shield logo is a vast network of retail stores, social programs, churches, and community services.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Claves para que el CIO fiche al mejor equipo de TI
item.description: Uno de los sueños de cualquier dirigente, sea o no de TI, es, sin duda, formar un ‘dream team‘, donde cada persona aporte su valor, en el que poder confiar plenamente y que se entienda y trabaje al unísono. La realidad no siempre resulta tan positiva.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: On average, state cyber leaders are leaving their positions sooner
item.description: The National Association of State CIOs and Deloitte outlined five calls to action in a recent survey of state chief information security officers. The post On average, state cyber leaders are leaving their positions sooner first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Lauren Sanchez alludes to ‘turbulence’ in life after ‘obscene’ Trump inauguration display
item.description: The fiancee of billionaire Jeff Bezos alluded to a rough start of 2025, several weeks after Megyn Kelly called her a 'hooker' for wearing a lacy white bustier top beneath a jacket to Trump's swearing-in.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Reset what you see on social media
item.description: Here's how to take control of the algorithms on Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and TikTok if your social media feeds aren't showing you content you want to see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Microsoft Visio cheat sheet: How to get started
item.description: It’s often much easier to convey information with a well-designed diagram than to communicate through a large text blurb. As the old saying goes, “a picture is worth a thousand words.” That’s where Microsoft Visio comes in.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: The International Olympic Committee says the first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The cloud giants stumble
item.description: Recent financial results from the major cloud providers reveal a concerning trend in cloud adoption and growth. AWS reported just 13% growth in the final quarter of 2023, Microsoft Azure saw 19% growth, and Google Cloud achieved 26% growth—all below market expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ESA’s space telescope Euclid discovers ‘astonishing' Einstein ring
item.description: The European Space Agency's Euclid space telescope was going through preliminary tests in September 2023 when it captured images of an Einstein Ring in a nearby galaxy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google’s generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help connect agents with databases
item.description: Google’s cloud computing division, Google Cloud, has added a new generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help enterprise developers connect agent-based generative AI applications to its databases.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top 20 apps tracking you every day
item.description: The apps collecting the most data about you are among the most widely used. Kurt the CyberGuy takes a look at 20 of these apps and how you can protect personal information.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5
